raw_consumer_statement: There was a charge on XX/XX/year> with Citi ( R ) cards, XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX SD XXXX in the amount of {$420.00} for XXXX XXXX. This charge was for a service repair on our XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX with an error code of XXXX. The technician came out and said the repair was complete. Immediately after the service was complete, the washer had the same error code of XXXX. I contacted XXXX to request a refund. They refused. I contacted citi multiple times to ask for a refund. They contacted the merchant and the merchant will not refund the money. Yes they did come out for the service HOWEVER they DID NOT fix the issue that was originally reported. I should not have to pay for a service the did NOT correct the problem.
